clauses.text: This Agreement is entered into between [CLIENT_NAME] ("Client") and [PROVIDER_NAME] ("Service Provider").
This Agreement governs the provision of [PROJECT_NAME] by the Service Provider to the Client.
The Service Provider shall develop the website described in [SERVICES_CONTRACTED] for [PROJECT_NAME].
The website shall be built using [TECHNOLOGY_STACK] and shall support [BROWSER_COMPATIBILITY].
The Service Provider shall deliver the Deliverables to the Client on or before [DELIVERY_DATE].
The Services shall take place on [DELIVERY_DATE] at , subject to any change confirmed in writing by both Parties.
The Client shall pay the Service Provider [TOTAL_VALUE] for the Services, payable via [PAYMENT_METHOD] according to the schedule agreed between the Parties.
If the Client fails to pay any amount due by its due date, the Service Provider may charge interest on the overdue amount at [LATE_PAYMENT_RATE] per month.

The Client shall test the website against the criteria in [ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA_LIST] using [ACCEPTANCE_METHOD] within [ACCEPTANCE_PERIOD_DAYS] days of delivery. If the Client does not respond within this period, the website shall be deemed accepted.

Where the website is built using custom code rather than a pre-built template, upon full payment of [TOTAL_VALUE], the Service Provider assigns to the Client all rights, title, and interest in the custom source code, under the ownership model [IP_OWNERSHIP_MODEL]. Where a pre-built template is used, the Client receives a license per the template provider's terms, and the Service Provider retains no ownership claim over the template itself.

Where [MAINTENANCE_INCLUDED] indicates inclusion, the Service Provider shall provide maintenance services for [MAINTENANCE_PERIOD] following launch, for a fee of [MAINTENANCE_FEE] per [BILLING_PERIOD].
Where [HOSTING_INCLUDED] indicates inclusion, the Service Provider shall arrange hosting for the website at [HOSTING_PROVIDER] for a fee of [HOSTING_FEE] per [BILLING_PERIOD].
Where [DOMAIN_REGISTRATION_INCLUDED] indicates inclusion, the Service Provider shall register the domain [DOMAIN_NAME] on the Client's behalf, with the Client as the registered owner of record.
Where the Client requests technical support beyond the Warranty Clause period, the Service Provider shall provide it at [SUPPORT_HOURLY_RATE] per hour.
Where the Services include search engine optimization, the Service Provider shall perform the SEO activities described in [SEO_SCOPE] for an additional fee of [SEO_FEE].
Where the Services include training, the Service Provider shall provide [TRAINING_HOURS] hours of training on using and managing the website.

Each Party shall keep confidential any non-public information disclosed by the other Party in connection with this Agreement and shall not disclose it without the disclosing Party's prior written consent.
Where hosting is provided under the Hosting Clause, the Service Provider shall target availability of at least [UPTIME_TARGET_PERCENT].
The project shall proceed according to the milestones described in [MILESTONE_SCHEDULE], with payment released per the Payment Clause upon completion of each milestone.
The Client shall ensure the Service Provider has timely access to [EVENT_LOCATION] and any information reasonably necessary to perform the Services.
The Service Provider shall perform the Services with the skill and care ordinarily exercised by professionals providing comparable services under comparable circumstances.

The Service Provider warrants that the website shall be free of material defects for [WARRANTY_PERIOD_DAYS] days from launch. Defects reported within this period shall be corrected at no additional charge.
Each Party retains ownership of intellectual property it owned before this Agreement, including any framework, library, or tool the Service Provider incorporates into the website.
Neither Party shall be liable to the other for any indirect, incidental, or consequential loss arising from this Agreement.
Each Party's total liability arising from this Agreement shall not exceed [TOTAL_VALUE], except for loss arising from gross negligence, willful misconduct, or fraud.

Neither Party shall be liable for a failure to perform its obligations to the extent that failure results from an event beyond that Party's reasonable control that could not have been avoided through reasonable diligence. The affected Party shall notify the other Party without undue delay.
This Agreement shall be governed by [APPLICABLE_LAW]. Any dispute shall be submitted to [DISPUTE_RESOLUTION_MECHANISM] before litigation, except where interim injunctive relief is required.
The Parties have executed this Agreement as of [SIGNATURE_DATE].
